description: P4: Legal document in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (fl. 1100–1138 CE). Deathbed will of Yefet b. Yaʿaqov. He wills that his share in the rent of a house that he held in partnership with others (Ibn al-Dhahabī, Avraham al-Fuqqāʿī, Avraham b. [...], Abū Manṣūr al-Zayyāt) should be spent in two equal shares, one on bread for the poor and the other on a person specified by name. (Information from Goitein, Med Soc II, App. A, no. 180.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
